subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim, O My Gate! Hearken unto the Call of the Most Exalted Pen, which speaketh in the Persian tongue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم یا بابی ندای قلم اعلی را بشنو که بلسان پارسی تکلم میفرماید بعد از
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
